---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement that supports the MVP
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem are we trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful version of the idea.

## Core Loop Fit

Explain how this supports capturing, reviewing, following up on, or closing a waiting item.

## Scope Risk

What might need to be cut or deferred if this is added?

## Notes

Add any relevant examples or references.
